questions.question: airflow upgrade-check --to-version 3.0 — что делает?

options.text: Built-in CLI command. Scans DAGs + config + plugins для deprecation issues. Output: WARNING (works но deprecated), CRITICAL (breaks в 3.x), INFO. Categories: imports renames, deprecated APIs (execution_date), removed operators (SubDAG), FAB usage, airflow.contrib. Не fixes — только reports

questions.explanation: airflow upgrade-check — built-in (2.7+) Python CLI. Scans codebase, lists deprecation issues с severity. Run в CI weekly — track count over time. Manual fix CRITICAL items first (SubDAG removal, FAB hooks). Auto-fix WARNINGS через ruff AIR301/AIR302. Built-in не fixes — just reports. Strategy: warning mode в CI initially, fix gradually, strict mode перед migration day.

questions.question: Ruff AIR301 vs AIR302 — отличия?

options.text: AIR301 — deprecated IMPORTS (from airflow.decorators → from airflow.sdk, from airflow import Dataset → from airflow.sdk import asset). Auto-fix через `ruff check --fix`. AIR302 — deprecated APIs (execution_date → logical_date, schedule_interval → schedule, sla parameter removed). Partial auto-fix

questions.explanation: Ruff AIR rules — Airflow-specific lint rules. AIR301 — imports rename: `from airflow.decorators import dag, task` → `from airflow.sdk import dag, task`. Most cases simple regex match, auto-fix safe. AIR302 — deprecated API usage: parameter renames (schedule_interval → schedule), function parameter changes (execution_date → logical_date). Partial auto-fix — some cases need manual review (e.g., sla parameter removal requires Listener API rewrite).

questions.question: Production team enables ruff AIR301 в CI на 2.x. Sledствies?

options.text: Initially — block PRs если новый code имеет deprecated imports (но existing OK через per-file-ignores). Над time — auto-fix sweep всего codebase (ruff --fix). К migration day — 0 violations, codebase 3.x-compatible style. Risk: zero — auto-fix safe для AIR301, just rename imports

questions.explanation: Phased rollout: warning mode (CI logs only) → block new violations (pre-commit + CI) → bulk auto-fix sweep → strict mode. AIR301 auto-fix safe (just import rename, identical semantic в 2.x). Per-file-ignores для legacy code. Result: к migration day — 0 violations, codebase ready для 3.x. Process duration: 3-6 months gradual fix без production impact. Critical: ruff AIR rules доступны на 2.x — start using сейчас.

questions.question: ruff AIR301 auto-fix может safely run на production codebase без testing.
questions.explanation: ruff --fix safe для AIR301 (imports identical semantic), but ALWAYS run full test suite после bulk auto-fix. Reasons: (1) import order может change — некоторые linters care; (2) Imports renamed но usage может break если custom plugins have hardcoded references; (3) Some edge cases (custom modules с similarly-named symbols) — false positives. Production process: (a) ruff --fix в branch; (b) Run unit + integration tests; (c) Review diff в PR; (d) Merge after green CI. Never blindly merge auto-fix results — review like any other code change.
